mapper.insert: INSERT INTO aiot_device (device_code, device_name, device_type, ip_address, mac_address, mqtt_topic, firmware_version, sensor_list, remarks) VALUES (#{deviceCode}, #{deviceName}, #{deviceType}, #{ipAddress}, #{macAddress}, #{mqttTopic}, #{firmwareVersion}, #{sensorList}, #{remarks})

INSERT INTO aiot_device (device_code, device_name, ip_address, mac_address, mqtt_topic, led_status, mode, light_sensor, pir_status, screen_status, wifi_rssi, tcp_connected, online_status, last_report_time, register_source) VALUES (#{deviceCode}, #{deviceName}, #{ipAddress}, #{macAddress}, #{mqttTopic}, #{ledStatus}, #{mode}, #{lightSensor}, #{pirStatus}, #{screenStatus}, #{wifiRssi}, #{tcpConnected}, 1, NOW(), 'auto') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ip_address=VALUES(ip_address), led_status=VALUES(led_status), mode=VALUES(mode), light_sensor=VALUES(light_sensor), pir_status=VALUES(pir_status), screen_status=VALUES(screen_status), wifi_rssi=VALUES(wifi_rssi), tcp_connected=VALUES(tcp_connected), online_status=1, last_report_time=NOW(), update_time=NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE aiot_device SET led_status=#{ledStatus}, mode=#{mode}, light_sensor=#{lightSensor}, pir_status=#{pirStatus}, screen_status=#{screenStatus}, wifi_rssi=#{wifiRssi}, tcp_connected=#{tcpConnected}, online_status=1, last_report_time=NOW(), update_time=NOW() WHERE device_code=#{deviceCode}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM aiot_device WHERE online_status=1
mapper.update: UPDATE aiot_device SET online_status=#{onlineStatus}, update_time=NOW() WHERE device_code=#{deviceCode}
